note: Fixture placeholder (PLAN.md §4, phase 5): flowmap.trace/v1's real shape is upstream-owned and never strict-decoded by verdi (constitution: exec + strict-decode only the toolchain's own JSON, never invent a schema for a file verdi doesn't own).
